case_title: SMITH-EMERY COMPANY,INC. VS SAN FRANCISCO SENATORS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH-EMERY COMPANY,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENATORS INC. $1,527.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,578.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENATORS INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENATORS INC.
